players.name: Xeebs
matchupItemFlags: no magic resist vs a 3-magical enemy comp

notes: Their main damage was Shinbi (38k magical); 1/5 of us itemized magic resist — that hurt.
Enemy ran 2/5 on or near their meta core.

draftNote: 1 of five queued off a bottom-two lane: Mr_Meat31 (support→offlane).

threats: Chain-CC risk (1 hard-CC abilities, ~0.5s of lockdown): Grux Crush (knockup 0.5s). Don't group tight into it — stagger the engage and hold mobility/cleanse for the key one.
Heal-stacking: Narbash. Anti-heal is mandatory against this comp — we brought none.
synergy: Little hard CC on our side — we can't force a pick. Play for poke/objectives and punish their cooldowns, don't flip coin-toss 5v5s.
We have sustain (Phase) — favor the longer fight where our heals out-grind them.
Strong AoE/teamfight kit — group at choke points and fight on top of objectives.

ourKits.combo: Telekinetic Link an ally → Psychic Flare blind → Energy Lance → Hyperflux buff ult
ourKits.winCondition: buff a hyper-carry through the Link and Hyperflux for a teamfight
ourKits.passive: abilities heal her and her linked ally
ourKits.playWith: the strongest carry to Link and supercharge
ourKits.playAgainst: kill the linked carry, not Phase; break the link timing

ourKits.combo: Boreal Sweep slow → Hoarfrost root → Glacial Charge engage → Cryoseism stun ult
ourKits.winCondition: chain frost CC (slow→root→stun) to lock the fight down
ourKits.playWith: burst that converts her long CC chain into kills
ourKits.playAgainst: she's a CC battery — cleanse/QSS the Cryoseism stun; spread to avoid the chain

ourKits.combo: Piercing Shot poke → Heightened Senses AS → Hail of Arrows zone → Inner Fire ult
ourKits.winCondition: ramp Relentless + AS and sustained-DPS the front down
ourKits.playWith: heavy peel — she's immobile and pure DPS
ourKits.playAgainst: she has zero escape — hard-engage her and she dies first

ourKits.combo: Reaping Dash → Hamstring slows → Safeguard spellshield → Earth Shatter execute
ourKits.winCondition: trade with the spellshield up and execute low targets with Earth Shatter
ourKits.passive: permanent power on unique hero takedowns
ourKits.playWith: setup that holds a target for the execute
ourKits.playAgainst: bait Safeguard's spellshield before committing the key CC

ourKits.combo: Dread Nova stun → Ether Crystal push/lift → Particle Shredder channel → Synaptic Obliterator beams
ourKits.winCondition: poke from max range and zone with the crystal
ourKits.playWith: a frontline to protect his stationary channel
ourKits.playAgainst: dodge Dread Nova; dive him during the immobile ult channel

enemyKits.combo: Smash 'n Grab pull → Crush knockup → Warlord's Challenge stun → bleed-stacked basics
enemyKits.winCondition: land the pull→knockup chain to lock a target while bleed and AS shred them
enemyKits.passive: basics stack a bleed for sustained damage
enemyKits.playWith: follow-up burst inside his knockup/stun window
enemyKits.playAgainst: telegraphed engage — bait Crush/Pull, then punish; kite his slow start

enemyKits.combo: Vortex Grenade → Vaporize pierce → Rocket Dash reposition → Ventilate ult
enemyKits.winCondition: reposition with Rocket Dash and unload Ventilate from safety
enemyKits.passive: abilities grant AS + a triple-shot next basic
enemyKits.playWith: a frontline to create his free-fire window
enemyKits.playAgainst: he's mobile but squishy — CC through the dash, then burst

enemyKits.combo: Thunk stun → March! speed → Song heal aura → Crash Bang Boom! AoE slow ult
enemyKits.winCondition: engage with Thunk and group-buff the team through fights
enemyKits.playWith: a dive team that rides his speed and heal
enemyKits.playAgainst: dodge/cleanse Thunk; he's low-damage — kill his carry through the aura

enemyKits.combo: Void Breach slow → Cosmic Rift → Black Hole on the grouped enemies
enemyKits.winCondition: land Black Hole / Cosmic Rift on a clumped team for AoE burst
enemyKits.passive: an ability-empowered basic tethers a target for bonus damage
enemyKits.playWith: hard engage that clumps enemies into his Black Hole
enemyKits.playAgainst: immobile with long cooldowns — dodge the skillshots and dive him once Black Hole is down

enemyKits.combo: Rushing Beat dashes → Line Tempo wolves → Circle Rhythm shield → All-Kill! wolfpack ult
enemyKits.winCondition: stack Track and unleash All-Kill! in a grouped fight
enemyKits.playAgainst: spread vs the wolfpack; she's squishy without her shield up

itemTimelineNote: estMin = first minute the role's measured median gold curve covers the cumulative inventory cost (slot order ≈ purchase order) — THEORY, no purchase timestamps in either API

fights.note: caught-out = deaths outside every clustered fight; costs/conversion use a 90s window over timeline majors (older film — no tower times; Fang/Prime/Orb only); itemGap counts participants' items est. online (median-gold model, THEORY)
